review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.

Verify that bin/agent-protocol-review is created and contains the logic to parse .agent-state/workflow/dispatch.json, fallback to legacy, and conditionally execute an isolated mock SubAgent if a review gate is pending.
Verify that package.json was modified/created to expose the bin/agent-protocol-review script.
Verify NO implementation of Team Mode Cloud Sync logic (M5) occurred.
Verify NO removal of legacy Python tooling (M6) occurred.
Verify NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics occurred in the commit.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
